MODULE 4 / LESSON 2: WEBINAR CONTENT TIMELINE
WEBINAR CONTENT TIMELINE
In addition to the pre-show, the first part of your webinar should last
approximately 25 to 35 minutes if you’re planning a 60 minute webinar and 36
to 53 minutes if you’re planning a 90 minute webinar.
60 MINUTE WEBINAR
The suggested timeline for the content portion of your webinar if your
webinar is 60 minutes is:
• 	The Pre-Show > 30 minutes (prior to the webinar starting)
• 	Introduction > 2 minutes
• 	Objectives & Commitment > 3 - 5 minutes
• 	The Reframe or Opportunity (incl. Your Story) > 4 - 8 minutes
• 	Instructional Content > 15 - 20 minutes
90 MINUTE WEBINAR
The suggested timeline for the content portion of your webinar if your
webinar is 90 minutes is:
• 	The Pre-Show > 30 minutes (prior to the webinar starting)
• 	Introduction > 2 minutes
• 	Objectives & Commitment > 4 - 6 minutes
• 	The Reframe or Opportunity (incl. Your Story) > 5 - 10 minutes
• 	Instructional Content > 25 - 35 minutes
Notes:
